name: akbun-design
description: File and folder layout diagram tools by akbun

interface.shortDescription: File/folder layout diagram prompt and SVG skills
interface.longDescription: Design support skills that turn a directory structure into a clean file-and-folder layout diagram: an English image-generation prompt for image AI agents, plus an SVG that can be imported into Figma or Canva.
defaultPrompt: Draw this project's folder layout as a file-tree diagram image prompt
Make a file-tree SVG of this directory that I can import into Figma or Canva
